text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin hasn't arrived for our training session.
Just as I'm starting to think she might not show up
at all...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Well, my bike tire burst, and it took a while to
get it fixed...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The front one punctures so easily. Hmm. Maybe I
put too much weight on it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But forget all that—I'm really sorry about this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although her tardiness wasn't her fault, I warn
Ines Fujin to be more careful.
